backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Abyss Ascendant backend, defining data types and CRUD operations for user profiles, characters, items, and a marketplace, with access control and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Defines migration types for characters and items and exports a no-op `run` function that passes old actor state directly to the new actor shape.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: auto-granting starter equipment on character creation, and replacing the drop-rate slider in DungeonSelectScreen with a static informational display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, used as a reference document for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Abyss Ascendant' and mounting the app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing the full application screen flow (loading, login, profile setup, character select/creation, dungeon, inventory, marketplace, etc.) with health regen, HP sync to backend, and routing based on auth/profile state.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Full-screen modal component for browsing, purchasing, and equipping up to 3 abilities from the ability pool, with archetype filtering and slot-replacement support.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: Form component for creating a new character, allowing the user to set a name, realm (Softcore/Hardcore), and distribute stat points, then submits via a mutation and generates starter equipment.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelectS: Screen displaying the list of existing characters with options to select, delete (with confirmation dialog), or create a new one, enforcing an 8-character cap.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Detailed character panel showing attributes, derived combat stats, XP progress, equipped abilities, and buttons to open level-up and ability selection modals.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Animated combat log screen that simulates a dungeon encounter or ascension trial, streams log entries with a timer, and calls onComplete or onDeath based on the result.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: Screen for choosing dungeon mode and monster level before entering combat, displaying XP rate and drop rate info, with validation on the level input and a pending loot notification modal.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Reusable HP bar component that renders a color-coded progress bar (high/mid/low thresholds) in either compact or full size, with current/max HP labels.
Renders a tabbed inventory UI (Inventory, Stash, Equipped) allowing the player to select items and equip, unequip, or move them between tabs. Displays item details via ItemCard when an item is selected.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Renders a styled tooltip card for a GeneratedItem, showing its rarity-colored name, type, base stats, and affix lines with icons. Also exports an ItemCard variant for grid display.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Displays a mock leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore realm tabs, showing player rankings by level and XP using hardcoded placeholder data until a real backend endpoint is available.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Modal dialog that lets the player distribute pending stat points across Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Vitality using increment/decrement controls before confirming allocation.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying the game logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button with animated particle decorations.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: React component for a player marketplace where users can browse active item listings, list their own inventory items for sale with an ICP price, and buy items from other players.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar component displaying the game logo, character info, health bar, screen nav tabs, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Static placeholder screen for the Professions feature, showing four upcoming crafting disciplines (Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, Gathering) with a 'Coming Soon' badge.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that forces new users to choose a validated adventurer username before proceeding, submitting it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Static placeholder screen for the Shrines of Power feature, displaying four upcoming shrine types with animated icons and a 'Coming Soon' badge.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress toward the next level as a styled progress bar, supporting both compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a static array of combat abilities (e.g., Power Strike, Fireball, Backstab) with damage multipliers, scaling stats, cooldowns, and display metadata.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines the MonsterTemplate interface, a list of 10 monster templates with base stats, and a utility function to generate randomized monster display names using prefix/suffix pools.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the core combat simulation engine, including player stat derivation from equipped items, monster spawning with level scaling, and tick-based combat resolution with loot generation.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Generates randomized loot items with rarity rolling, affix selection, and level-scaled stat values for Weapon, Armor, and Trinket item types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHealthRegen.ts: React hook that regenerates player HP by 2 per second when out of combat and below max HP, syncing changes to the backend via callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: React hook that manages a local character state by merging backend character data with localStorage-persisted data such as inventory, equipped items, abilities, and stat points.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, character CRUD, HP setting, and marketplace operations, with custom error classes for character creation failures.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Cinzel and Inter fonts, and defines CSS custom properties for the dark fantasy theme including colors for surfaces, rarity tiers, and health bars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines core frontend game types including Screen navigation states, combat structures, item/equipment interfaces, class tier constants, and XP-per-level progression tables.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with CSS-variable-based colors for the game's dark fantasy palette, custom fonts, border radii, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the full-stack ICP hack-and-slash RPG's architecture, existing features, known issues, and versioned feature list for build planning.
